title: helichrysum paralium
intro: Helichrysum paralium, also known as the annual curry plant, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its yellow flowers and strong, pungent aroma. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum paralium include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Helichrysum paralium is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a range of health issues and promote overall well-being.
